Summer 2026 Calendar / Courses / Computing Science / CMPT 120

Introduction to Computing Science and Programming I CMPT 120 (3)

An elementary introduction to computing science. Prerequisite: BC Math 12 or equivalent is recommended.

Section Instructor Day/Time Location D100 Instructor May 11 - Aug 10, 2026 Burnaby D200 Instructor May 11 - Jun 19, 2026 Surrey
